summary: Phase 4 is complete: legacy CSS is reduced to resets, the shared shell smoke remains intact, the final build passes, and the project has been redeployed successfully on the final runtime config.

checks.name: CHECK-01: styles.css reduced to global resets
checks.actual: styles.css has 9 lines and no legacy class selectors.

checks.name: CHECK-02: Final deployment is healthy
checks.expected: Container healthy and /health returns ok on the final deploy
checks.actual: social-listening-v3 is healthy after final redeploy and /health returned {"status":"ok","version":"0.1.0"}.

checks.name: CHECK-03: Frontend build passes on final code
checks.actual: Final local build succeeded, and Docker frontend builder step also succeeded.

checks.name: CHECK-04: Shared shell smoke log confirms migrated UI
checks.expected: Demo log confirms hero removal, shared shell usage, and header/theme toggle presence
checks.actual: DEMO_LOG.md confirms hero/checkpoint removal, AppHeader + theme toggle presence, AppLayout shell usage, and all major pages rendering through the shared shell.

checks.name: CHECK-05: Final runtime uses live-browser config
checks.command: docker inspect social-listening-v3 --format '{{range .Config.Env}}{{println .}}{{end}}' | rg '^BROWSER_MOCK_MODE=' && curl -s http://127.0.0.1:8000/api/browser/status
checks.actual: Final container is running with BROWSER_MOCK_MODE=false, and /api/browser/status returned session_status=VALID with health_status=HEALTHY.
